findings.title: Missing Security Header: Strict-Transport-Security
findings.description: Enforces HTTPS connections. This header is not present in the response.

findings.title: Missing Security Header: Content-Security-Policy
findings.description: Prevents XSS and data injection attacks. This header is not present in the response.

findings.title: Missing Security Header: X-Frame-Options
findings.description: Prevents clickjacking attacks. This header is not present in the response.

findings.title: Missing Security Header: X-Content-Type-Options
findings.description: Prevents MIME type sniffing. This header is not present in the response.

findings.title: Missing Security Header: Referrer-Policy
findings.description: Controls referrer information. This header is not present in the response.

findings.title: Missing Security Header: Permissions-Policy
findings.description: Controls browser features and APIs. This header is not present in the response.
